title: eupatorium congestum var. hirsutum
intro: Eupatorium congestum var. hirsutum, also known as hairy boneset, is a perennial herb belonging to the Asteraceae family, native to North America. Traditionally, hairy boneset has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of hairy boneset include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and soothe sore throats. Herbal preparations of hairy boneset can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's roots to create a tincture for medicinal purposes.
